evals.prompt: Write a Sui Move module for a tagged item collection. Items should have a name and a list of string tags. Include functions to create items, add tags, count tags, and destroy items.
expectations: Code compiles with sui move build
Uses Move 2024 module declaration (semicolon, no outer braces)
Uses method syntax (e.g., vector.push_back(), .length()) instead of legacy function-call syntax
